eval_prompt: 基于上一轮已经构建的知识库（/tmp/atom-wiki-eval-1/），回答问题：自注意力机制和循环神经网络在处理长距离依赖时各有什么优劣势？

1_atom_citations.description: 回答中引用了知识库中的 atom（通过文件路径或标题引用）
1_atom_citations.details: The answer includes multiple inline citations linking to atoms in the knowledge base: atoms/concepts/self-attention-mechanism.md, atoms/comparisons/transformer-vs-rnn.md, atoms/facts/self-attention-o2-complexity.md, atoms/concepts/positional-encoding.md. At least 4 distinct atoms are cited.
evidence: ([自注意力的 O(n^2) 计算复杂度](atoms/facts/self-attention-o2-complexity.md))

2_self_attention_advantages.description: 回答包含自注意力机制的优势（如并行计算、直接关注远距离位置）
2_self_attention_advantages.details: The answer comprehensively covers self-attention advantages: direct long-range modeling (一步可达), parallel training (并行训练/GPU充分利用), short gradient path (O(1) gradient propagation avoiding vanishing gradients). All key advantages are present and well-explained.
evidence: 直接长距离建模：自注意力机制使模型能够直接关注序列中任意位置
并行训练：所有位置同时处理，可充分利用现代硬件加速器
梯度路径短：梯度传播路径长度为 O(1)，有效缓解了 RNN 中常见的梯度消失问题

3_rnn_disadvantages.description: 回答包含循环神经网络的劣势（如梯度消失、串行计算）
3_rnn_disadvantages.details: The answer thoroughly covers RNN disadvantages: gradient vanishing (梯度消失问题), sequential computation limiting parallelization (顺序依赖限制了并行化), and long-range information decay (长距离信息衰减). All key disadvantages are present.
evidence: 梯度消失问题：信息通过隐藏状态逐层传递，长距离依赖的梯度在反向传播时容易消失或爆炸
训练速度慢：顺序依赖限制了并行化，无法充分利用 GPU 的并行计算能力
长距离信息衰减：即使使用 LSTM/GRU 等变体缓解梯度问题，信息在长距离传递过程中仍会有一定程度的衰减

4_confidence_statement.description: 回答包含置信度说明（如 high/medium/low confidence）
4_confidence_statement.details: The answer includes an explicit confidence statement '置信度：高' (High confidence) with reasoning: based on 4 atom files from the knowledge base, all sources consistent (all derived from transformer-overview.md), no contradictions found.
evidence: 本答案基于知识库中 4 个原子文件的综合信息，涵盖自注意力机制原理、计算复杂度、Transformer 与 RNN 的多维度对比，以及位置编码的设计考量。所有信息来源一致（均源自 transformer-overview.md），未发现矛盾。

summary.assessment: The answer quality is excellent: it provides thorough comparative analysis with proper citations, covers all required advantages and disadvantages, includes confidence assessment with reasoning, and identifies knowledge gaps. The main failure is on assertion 5 - no new atoms were created from the valuable analysis. The answer's comparison table, detailed advantages/disadvantages sections, and synthesis about quality-vs-efficiency tradeoff represent content that should have been persisted as new comparison/synthesis atoms. Additionally, there is an inconsistency in the wiki state: the eval-state snapshot appears to be from before the efficient-transformers.md atomization round (missing several atoms and synthesis entry that existed in /tmp/atom-wiki-eval-1/), which may have prevented the system from recognizing that the comparison atom already existed.
